items.title: Meydan Free Zone Partners With Alaan To Bring Smart Finance To Every New Startup In Dubai
items.description: Meydan Free Zone partners with Alaan to offer startups seamless financial tools. Businesses get access to unlimited smart corporate cards, AI-powered expense tracking, and 2% cashback, built into their business license, streamlining setup, spend control, and compliance from day one. items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz on Peter’s Substack by Peter Thomason. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on KSPI. items.title: Coinbase (COIN) vs. Visa (V): Which One of These Stocks Flashing Unusual Options Activity Wins Out?
items.description: Rather than relying on vibes and presuppositional fallacies, we dig into probabilistic math and applied game theory to give you a clear answer.

items.title: Global Payments to Report Q2 Earnings: Here Are the Estimates
items.description: GPN is likely to report second-quarter earnings with 3.4% year-over-year growth expected, but rising costs may weigh on overall profit gains.

items.title: Can Fidelity National Beat Q2 Earnings on Capital Market Strength?
items.description: FIS is likely to beat second-quarter earnings forecasts, driven by strength in Capital Market and Banking Solutions operations.
